ddls:
CREATE TABLE "constructions" (
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construction type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the construction type */,
  "total_layers" INTEGER /* Total number of layers in the construction */,
  "total_solid_layers" INTEGER /* Total number of solid layers in the construction */,
  "total_glass_layers" INTEGER /* Total number of glass layers in the construction */,
  "inside_absorp_vis" REAL /* Inside absorption of visible light (0-1) */,
  "outside_absorp_vis" REAL /* Outside absorption of visible light (0-1) */,
  "inside_absorp_solar" REAL /* Inside absorption of solar radiation (0-1) */,
  "outside_absorp_solar" REAL /* Outside absorption of solar radiation (0-1) */,
  "inside_absorp_thermal" REAL /* Inside absorption of thermal radiation (0-1) */,
  "outside_absorp_thermal" REAL /* Outside absorption of thermal radiation (0-1) */,
  "outside_roughness" INTEGER /* Roughness of the outside surface (1-6) */,
  "type_is_window" INTEGER /* Indicates if the construction is a window (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "uvalue" REAL /* U-value of the construction (W/m²K) */,
  "construction_material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary material used in the construction */,
  "construction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction type */,
  "construction_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the construction in meters */,
  "construction_area" REAL /* Area of the construction in square meters */,
  "construction_volume" REAL /* Volume of the construction in cubic meters */,
  "construction_cost" REAL /* Cost of the construction in the local currency */,
  "construction_supplier" TEXT /* Name of the supplier providing the construction materials */,
  "construction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the construction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("construction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constructions_construction_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("construction_material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constructions_construction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("construction_type_id") REFERENCES construction_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Planning, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the project supervisor */,
  "project_client" TEXT /* Name of the client or organization commissioning the project */,
  "project_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  "project_estimated_completion" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the project */,
  "project_actual_completion" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the project (if completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the construction type (e.g., Floor, Wall, Window) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the construction type */,
  "construction_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the construction type (e.g., Structural, Non-Structural, Decorative) */,
  "construction_type_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the construction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "thermal_conductivity" REAL /* Thermal conductivity of the material (W/mK) */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material (kg/m³) */,
  "specific_heat" REAL /* Specific heat of the material (J/kgK) */,
  "material_supplier" TEXT /* Name of the supplier providing the material */,
  "material_cost" REAL /* Cost of the material per unit volume in the local currency */,
  "material_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the material */,
  "material_sustainability_rating" INTEGER /* Sustainability rating of the material (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_constructions" (
  "project_construction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-construction association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction used in the project */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the construction used */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation of the construction */,
  "project_construction_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the construction used in the project */,
  "project_construction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the construction used in the project */,
  "project_construction_quality" TEXT /* Quality status of the construction (e.g., Good, Needs Inspection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_construction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_constructions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_constructions_construction_id FOREIGN KEY ("construction_id") REFERENCES constructions ("construction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, engineer, project manager) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Architecture, Engineering, Project Management) */,
  "user_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "user_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the construction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the construction data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_construction_id FOREIGN KEY ("construction_id") REFERENCES constructions ("construction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption of the construction (kWh/m²) */,
  "thermal_comfort" REAL /* Thermal comfort level (0-100) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status (e.g., Good, Needs Repair) */,
  "performance_metric_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance metric */,
  "performance_metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data (e.g., Sensor, Manual Entry) */,
  "performance_metric_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the performance metric (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_construction_id FOREIGN KEY ("construction_id") REFERENCES constructions ("construction_id")
)
